jcr:content.jcr:description: AbbVie supports employee well-being through resources that aid in mental, physican and financial health.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Well-Being in the Workplace
jcr:content.ctaAltText: Learn more about well-being in the workplace
jcr:content.description: People do their best work when they’re feeling their best.
jcr:content.title: Well-Being in the Workplace

text.text: People do their best when they're at their best. That's why we support our employees' physical, mental and financial well-being.

item_1747235167818.text:
To face day-to-day challenges our global Employee Assistance Program (EAP) is here to help. EAP is a free confidential service providing assistance, counseling and coaching on personal or work concerns such as stress, grief, chronic illness, relationship and family concerns and referrals to legal and financial resources.  EAP is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, in local language. Employees have 8 to 10 free sessions depending on location. 

We offer webinars for all employees on a variety of mental health wellness topics to ensure you can be your best self, at work and at home. Leaders are also provided learning opportunities to develop the skills and confidence to identify and support employees struggling with mental health challenges and guide them to the right resources.

item_1747235184819.text: Our flexible ways of working help you work in ways most effective for you. Through our hybrid work model for site- and office-based employees, employees have predictable flexibility without sacrificing in-person collaboration. The model consists of three minimum set days in the office and two days of remote work per week. In the U.S., the days are fixed at Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday, while other countries have established their designated in-office days for hybrid employees. Depending on your role, we may offer other types of flexibility, including part-time, remote work, job sharing, shift changes, compressed work weeks and more.

item_1747235204961.cq:panelTitle: Recognize the connection between physical and mental health
item_1747235204961.text: Your physical and mental health are interconnected. We offer a variety of programs that reduce the stigma around conditions like migraine, menopause and mental health. In doing so, we create space for open dialogue and better access to care, which contributes to stronger individual and team performance.

item_1747235221745.text:
AbbVie has taken steps to create a migraine-friendly workplace. This includes training and resources, as well as accommodations that address migraine triggers.

This approach fosters an inclusive workplace where all employees are treated with dignity and respect, reaffirming AbbVie's Principle of embracing diversity and inclusion.

quote_1661374647.quote: AbbVie’s hybrid work model has given me the space to be the type of parent that I want to be.

title.jcr:title: Take care of the people you love

text.text:
At AbbVie, we help you take time for family, whether you’re welcoming a new child, ensuring your children have great day care and academic success, or looking after aging loved ones.

No matter your stage in life, our support benefits and programs and generous leave policies help you focus on caring for the people who matter to you.
of paid leave in the U.S. for all parents welcoming a child through birth, adoption, fostering or surrogacy

text_copy.text: paid leave in the U.S. to care for family members with a serious health condition

text.text: Employee well-being events, such as our global "AbbVie in Motion" exercise challenge, provide opportunities to make connections with colleagues while promoting healthy behaviors. Together, AbbVie colleagues around the world logged more than 25 million physical activity minutes during 2024's four-week team challenge.

AbbVie offers free well-being screenings to learn your personal health numbers (blood pressure, cholesterol, body mass index, blood glucose levels and more), and flu vaccinations, including at our on-site health care centers in Lake County, IL.

Fitness center discounts are also available across the U.S., and in some locations, on-site fitness centers are available to stay fit and healthy. Select locations also offer recreation clubs and sports leagues, including basketball, golf, jazz, and language, to name a few.

text_copy.text: Live for today while planning for tomorrow. AbbVie’s global focus on financial well-being can help you build and sustain your financial knowledge, take control of your current financial situation and establish a plan to achieve future financial goals. In the U.S., we partner with an award-winning provider who offers financial assessments and free educational resources across a range of financial topics, as well as personalized coaching. Outside the U.S., local resources are available. During our Week of Financial Well-Being, we provide resources to help all employees with budgeting, debt management and savings.

title_copy.jcr:title: Get financial support when it matters most

text.text: When the unexpected happens, you can count on AbbVie to help. Through the AbbVie Employee Assistance Fund (AEAF) , we provide financial support to eligible employees during times of major personal hardship or in the event of a disaster. The AEAF, which is part of the AbbVie Foundation, also gives support at another pivotal moment: when a child goes to college.
